case_title: R. THERESA CURRIE VS. ALCO CALIFORNIA CORP

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CURRIE, R. THERESA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALCO CALIFORNIA CORP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
